nodes.name: Lamprotornis
nodes.summary: Lamprotornis（Lamprotornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联22种鸟类，如希氏丽椋鸟、Shelley's starling、Burchell's starling等22种鸟类。

nodes.name: Principe starling
nodes.summary: The Principe starling (Lamprotornis ornatus), also known as the Príncipe glossy-starling, is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is endemic to São Tomé and Príncipe. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. Gallery References
nodes.shortSummary: The Principe starling (Lamprotornis ornatus), also known as the Príncipe glossy-starling, is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae.…
